fields.label: Header HTML
fields.rationale: HTML for the document header (logo, company name, address, contact block). Empty means no header. Referenced by Print Formats via their letter_head field.

fields.label: Footer HTML
fields.rationale: HTML for the document footer (page number, legal disclaimer, bank details). Empty means no footer.

fields.label: Default site-wide
fields.rationale: Default to 0. Set to 1 only if this should become the site-wide default letter head (replaces any existing default; existing documents re-render with the new header on next print).

fields.label: Disabled
fields.rationale: Disabled letter heads are hidden from Print Format dropdowns. Default enabled.

fields.label: Source
fields.rationale: HTML lets the letter head adapt to the page layout and uses Jinja. Image uses a flat image (uploaded to the filesystem) and skips Jinja - use only for legally-required fixed layouts.
